global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a focus on app promotion.
global.main_message: Promoting the BingeLayer app with a seasonal offer.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A simplified app interface with geometric shapes, including circles and squares, displayed in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in light purple tones, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: More geometric shapes in light purple, complementing the app interface.

elements.label: Small element
elements.description: A small, circular element in a muted color, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Another small element
elements.description: Another small circular element, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly above it.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'A new season drops Start free today' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: A new season drops Start free today

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' in bold white text, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Get offer' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, BingeLayer logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: A new season drops Start free today, BingeLayer, Get offer, UGC
